title: Creating: Infinite Horizons
description: A modpack that makes the create mod harder by changing recipes and adding other mods like dungeons now loading to make the experience better
body:
# What is this?
 >This is a thrilling mod pack with adventure, automation, and creation. This mod pack will add many new recipes to the game, aiming to achieve an interconnected mod pack experience. It utilizes KubeJS along with a data pack system to replace, modify, and add items, blocks, and recipes. This mod pack is a labor of love by you and the development team, so please bear with us as we strive to create an enjoyable, challenging, and rewarding mod pack experience.

## Core concepts:
 >This modpack is very create focused, for example to craft a iron chest plate you need three iron plates, three iron blocks, and two iron nuggets. this recipe points out the other main feature of this mod which is its difficulty curve when it comes to resource cost of almost any item in the game. create is needed for almost recipe for the sheer cost of materials, furthermore some recipes have been locked behind structures added by some mods; for the drill from the create mod takes a mendstone chalk, this is made with mendstone, a diamond equivilent tier material found in the dungeon now loading stuctures. along with all previous changes many recipes are changed to make more sense with the other mods. this is to keep the pack feeling as cohesive as possible. (all recipes shown here are in the "new features to preview:" header.) 

## New features; preview:
 >![Iron Chestplate recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a08d2e3af0ca8108c200b44aa3b08d5e04a4295.png)
  >![Mechanical Drill Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c29195ad961444613cf001df5566bc2f4335cb.png)
 >![Iron Pickaxe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a58c90def9d74531f23fe1b59b6563efabcbe089.png)
